return(function(...)local function j(j)return d[j-(955007+-946063)]end for j,Y in ipairs({{-286266-(-286267),578745+-578321};{-803677+803678;-525986+526120};{135001+-134866,-163245-(-163669)}})do while Y(d,{x,N;o,G},j,v)end return x end,{},function(Y,x,N,o)local i,w,r,p,X,jR,e,L,Z,k,S,dR,M,K,P,y,I,J,F,B,W,H,A,c,u,V,O,b,l,z,U,C,E,m while Y do if Y<839491+6842754 then if Y<219516+3296484 then if
